subcodes.title: Commentary on a verse from Sa'di
subcodes.first_line: The intent of the poet in these verses, "The Friend is closer to me that I am to myself
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه از معنی بیت در آیات الهی نازل و از افق سماء حقیقت مشرق همان تمام است و
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @nearness and remoteness, @Word of God and human limitations, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
